mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO RAW_FILE_CELL ( cell_id, upload_id, row_num, column_name, column_value, created_at )
SELECT RAW_FILE_CELL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cell.uploadId}, #{cell.rowNum}, #{cell.columnName}, #{cell.columnValue}, #{cell.createdAt} FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT cell_id AS cellId, upload_id AS uploadId, row_num AS rowNum, column_name AS columnName, column_value AS columnValue, created_at AS createdAt FROM RAW_FILE_CELL WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} ORDER BY row_num ASC, cell_id ASC
